label: 宇宙生物群系映射
description: 根据星球类型将高度图和湿度图映射为地形类型grid，支持6种星球风格
description-en: Maps elevation and moisture grids to terrain type grid based on planet type (lush/desert/frozen/volcanic/toxic/barren).
icon: 六格星球类型图标，每格一种地形配色，从蓝绿到红火渐变排列，扁平插画风格，简洁小图标，主色2种。

inputs.name: planetType
inputs.label: 星球类型
inputs.description: 星球环境类型，决定地形映射规则
inputs.description-en: Planet environment type, determines terrain mapping rules.

outputs.name: terrainGridList
outputs.label: 地形网格列表
outputs.description: 多张单值网格，每张对应一种地形；该网格在对应格子填充该地形的id（从1起），其余为0；与nameList顺序一一对应
outputs.description-en: Multiple single-value grids, one per terrain type; each grid has the terrain id (starting from 1) at matching cells and 0 elsewhere; corresponds 1:1 with nameList.

outputs.name: nameList
outputs.label: 地形名称列表
outputs.description: 该星球所有地形类型 [{id(从1起), name, type:"tile", height(连续递增)}]，按高度升序，与terrainGridList顺序一一对应
outputs.description-en: All terrain types for this planet [{id(from 1), name, type:"tile", height(sequential)}], sorted by height, corresponds 1:1 with terrainGridList.
